creator: alexbestms@math.uni-muenster.de
text: The Frequently Asked Questions About The FreeBSD Mailing Lists article (http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/mailing-list-faq/) should mention how to get to the mailman member option page of a subscribed mailinglist (http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/options/%MAILINGLIST%/%MAIL_ADDRESS%).
